Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC300 "OMICRON-JIMROOF-C300" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Omicron (Jim Roof).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The actual entry point to set a breakpoint is $C111. However, when the title screen is redisplayed after a game is finished, the routine at $C300 is called which sets up various IO registers before jumping to $C111. Therefore, this address is used instead.
Additionally, the routine at $C300 has also been modified to set the screen colour to black (at $C319) to ensure the title screen is displayed correctly.
